tldr_zh: VerseCrafter 提出了一个 4D 感知的视频世界模型，它使用一种新颖的 4D 几何控制表示和一个数据引擎来生成具有明确相机和对象动力学控制的逼真视频。它利用点云和高斯轨迹进行类别无关的表示，从而调节预训练的视频扩散模型。
summary_zh: 视频世界模型旨在模拟动态的真实世界环境，然而现有方法难以对相机和多物体运动提供统一且精确的控制，因为视频本质上是在投影的2D图像平面上运行动态。为了弥合这一差距，我们引入了VerseCrafter，一种4D感知的视频世界模型，它能够在统一的4D几何世界状态中显式且连贯地控制相机和物体动态。我们的方法以一种新颖的4D几何控制表示为中心，该表示通过静态背景点云和每个物体的3D高斯轨迹来编码世界状态。这种表示不仅捕捉物体的路径，还捕捉其随时间的概率3D occupancy，为刚性边界框或参数模型提供了一种灵活的、类别无关的替代方案。这些4D控制被渲染成预训练视频扩散模型的条件信号，从而能够生成高保真、视角一致的视频，这些视频精确地符合指定的动态。然而，另一个主要的挑战在于缺乏带有显式4D标注的大规模训练数据。我们通过开发一个自动数据引擎来解决这个问题，该引擎从真实世界视频中提取所需的4D控制，从而使我们能够在海量且多样化的数据集上训练我们的模型。

title: UniLiPs: Unified LiDAR Pseudo-Labeling with Geometry-Grounded Dynamic Scene Decomposition
summary: Unlabeled LiDAR logs, in autonomous driving applications, are inherently a gold mine of dense 3D geometry hiding in plain sight - yet they are almost useless without human labels, highlighting a dominant cost barrier for autonomous-perception research. In this work we tackle this bottleneck by leveraging temporal-geometric consistency across LiDAR sweeps to lift and fuse cues from text and 2D vision foundation models directly into 3D, without any manual input. We introduce an unsupervised multi-modal pseudo-labeling method relying on strong geometric priors learned from temporally accumulated LiDAR maps, alongside with a novel iterative update rule that enforces joint geometric-semantic consistency, and vice-versa detecting moving objects from inconsistencies. Our method simultaneously produces 3D semantic labels, 3D bounding boxes, and dense LiDAR scans, demonstrating robust generalization across three datasets. We experimentally validate that our method compares favorably to existing semantic segmentation and object detection pseudo-labeling methods, which often require additional manual supervision. We confirm that even a small fraction of our geometrically consistent, densified LiDAR improves depth prediction by 51.5% and 22.0% MAE in the 80-150 and 150-250 meters range, respectively.
tldr: The paper introduces UniLiPs, an unsupervised multi-modal pseudo-labeling method that leverages temporal-geometric consistency in LiDAR data to generate 3D semantic labels, bounding boxes, and dense LiDAR scans without manual input, outperforming existing methods and improving depth prediction.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了UniLiPs，一种无监督多模态伪标签方法，利用激光雷达数据中的时间几何一致性生成3D语义标签、边界框和密集激光雷达扫描，无需人工输入，优于现有方法并改善了深度预测。
summary_zh: 在自动驾驶应用中，未标注的激光雷达（LiDAR）日志本质上是一个唾手可得的密集3D几何信息宝库，但如果没有人工标注，它们几乎毫无用处，凸显了自动感知研究的一个主要成本障碍。 本文通过利用激光雷达扫描之间的时序-几何一致性，将文本和2D视觉基础模型中的线索直接提升并融合到3D中，以解决这一瓶颈，而无需任何手动输入。 我们提出了一种无监督的多模态伪标签方法，该方法依赖于从时间累积的激光雷达地图中学习到的强几何先验，以及一种新颖的迭代更新规则，该规则强制执行联合的几何-语义一致性，反之亦然，从不一致性中检测移动物体。 我们的方法同时生成3D语义标签、3D bounding boxes和密集的激光雷达扫描，证明了在三个数据集上的稳健泛化能力。 实验验证表明，我们的方法优于现有的语义分割和目标检测伪标签方法，这些方法通常需要额外的人工监督。 我们确认，即使是一小部分几何一致、密集化的激光雷达，也能分别将80-150米和150-250米范围内的深度预测的平均绝对误差（MAE）降低51.5%和22.0%。

title: SOVABench: A Vehicle Surveillance Action Retrieval Benchmark for Multimodal Large Language Models
summary:
Automatic identification of events and recurrent behavior analysis are critical for video surveillance. However, most existing content-based video retrieval benchmarks focus on scene-level similarity and do not evaluate the action discrimination required in surveillance. To address this gap, we introduce SOVABench (Surveillance Opposite Vehicle Actions Benchmark), a real-world retrieval benchmark built from surveillance footage and centered on vehicle-related actions. SOVABench defines two evaluation protocols (inter-pair and intra-pair) to assess cross-action discrimination and temporal direction understanding. Although action distinctions are generally intuitive for human observers, our experiments show that they remain challenging for state-of-the-art vision and multimodal models.
  Leveraging the visual reasoning and instruction-following capabilities of Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs), we present a training-free framework for producing interpretable embeddings from MLLM-generated descriptions for both images and videos. The framework achieves strong performance on SOVABench as well as on several spatial and counting benchmarks where contrastive Vision-Language Models often fail. The code, annotations, and instructions to construct the benchmark are publicly available.
tldr: The paper introduces SOVABench, a new video retrieval benchmark focusing on vehicle action discrimination in surveillance videos, and proposes a training-free framework using MLLMs to generate interpretable embeddings for improved performance.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了SOVABench，一个新的视频检索基准，专注于监控视频中车辆动作的区分，并提出了一个使用MLLM生成可解释嵌入的无训练框架，以提高性能。
summary_zh:
事件的自动识别和复发行为的分析对于视频监控至关重要。然而，现有的大多数基于内容的视频检索基准侧重于场景级别的相似性，而没有评估监控中所需的动作区分能力。为了解决这一差距，我们引入了SOVABench（监控反向车辆动作基准），这是一个由真实监控录像构建的、以车辆相关动作为中心的检索基准。SOVABench定义了两种评估协议（互配对和内配对）来评估跨动作区分和时间方向理解能力。尽管动作区分对于人类观察者来说通常是直观的，但我们的实验表明，对于最先进的视觉和多模态模型来说，它们仍然具有挑战性。
利用多模态大型语言模型（MLLM）的视觉推理和指令跟随能力，我们提出了一个免训练框架，用于从MLLM生成的图像和视频描述中产生可解释的嵌入。该框架在SOVABench以及几个对比视觉-语言模型经常失效的空间和计数基准上都取得了优异的性能。构建该基准的代码、注释和说明已公开可用。

title: Agri-R1: Empowering Generalizable Agricultural Reasoning in Vision-Language Models with Reinforcement Learning
summary: Agricultural disease diagnosis challenges VLMs, as conventional fine-tuning requires extensive labels, lacks interpretability, and generalizes poorly. While reasoning improves model robustness, existing methods rely on costly expert annotations and rarely address the open-ended, diverse nature of agricultural queries. To address these limitations, we propose \textbf{Agri-R1}, a reasoning-enhanced large model for agriculture. Our framework automates high-quality reasoning data generation via vision-language synthesis and LLM-based filtering, using only 19\% of available samples. Training employs Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO) with a novel proposed reward function that integrates domain-specific lexicons and fuzzy matching to assess both correctness and linguistic flexibility in open-ended responses. Evaluated on CDDMBench, our resulting 3B-parameter model achieves performance competitive with 7B- to 13B-parameter baselines, showing a +23.2\% relative gain in disease recognition accuracy, +33.3\% in agricultural knowledge QA, and a +26.10-point improvement in cross-domain generalization over standard fine-tuning. Ablation studies confirm that the synergy between structured reasoning data and GRPO-driven exploration underpins these gains, with benefits scaling as question complexity increases.
tldr: The paper introduces Agri-R1, a reinforcement learning-enhanced vision-language model for agricultural reasoning. It automates reasoning data generation and employs Group Relative Policy Optimization to achieve competitive performance with larger models, demonstrating improved accuracy and generalization in agricultural tasks.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了 Agri-R1，一个用于农业推理的强化学习视觉语言模型。 它通过自动化推理数据生成并采用组相对策略优化，以实现与更大模型相比具有竞争力的性能，并在农业任务中表现出更高的准确性和泛化能力。
summary_zh: 农业病害诊断对视觉语言模型（VLMs）构成挑战，因为传统的微调需要大量的标签，缺乏可解释性，且泛化能力较差。虽然推理可以提高模型的鲁棒性，但现有方法依赖于代价高昂的专家标注，并且很少解决农业查询的开放性和多样性问题。为了克服这些局限性，我们提出了\textbf{Agri-R1}，一种用于农业的推理增强型大模型。我们的框架通过视觉语言合成和基于LLM的过滤自动生成高质量的推理数据，仅使用了19%的可用样本。训练采用群体相对策略优化（GRPO），并提出了一种新的奖励函数，该函数集成了领域特定的词汇表和模糊匹配，以评估开放式回答的正确性和语言灵活性。在CDDMBench上的评估显示，我们得到的30亿参数模型达到了与70亿至130亿参数基线模型相当的性能，在疾病识别准确率上实现了+23.2%的相对提升，在农业知识问答上实现了+33.3%的相对提升，并且在跨领域泛化方面比标准微调提高了+26.10个百分点。消融研究证实，结构化推理数据与GRPO驱动的探索之间的协同作用支撑了这些优势，且随着问题复杂性的增加，收益也会随之增加。

title: Addressing Overthinking in Large Vision-Language Models via Gated Perception-Reasoning Optimization
summary: Large Vision-Language Models (LVLMs) have exhibited strong reasoning capabilities through chain-of-thought mechanisms that generate step-by-step rationales. However, such slow-thinking approaches often lead to overthinking, where models produce excessively verbose responses even for simple queries, resulting in test-time inefficiency and even degraded accuracy. Prior work has attempted to mitigate this issue via adaptive reasoning strategies, but these methods largely overlook a fundamental bottleneck: visual perception failures. We argue that stable reasoning critically depends on low-level visual grounding, and that reasoning errors often originate from imperfect perception rather than insufficient deliberation. To address this limitation, we propose Gated Perception-Reasoning Optimization (GPRO), a meta-reasoning controller that dynamically routes computation among three decision paths at each generation step: a lightweight fast path, a slow perception path for re-examining visual inputs, and a slow reasoning path for internal self-reflection. To learn this distinction, we derive large-scale failure attribution supervision from approximately 790k samples, using teacher models to distinguish perceptual hallucinations from reasoning errors. We then train the controller with multi-objective reinforcement learning to optimize the trade-off between task accuracy and computational cost under uncertainty. Experiments on five benchmarks demonstrate that GPRO substantially improves both accuracy and efficiency, outperforming recent slow-thinking methods while generating significantly shorter responses.
tldr: This paper introduces Gated Perception-Reasoning Optimization (GPRO), a meta-reasoning controller for LVLMs that dynamically routes computation between fast, perception, and reasoning paths to improve accuracy and efficiency by addressing overthinking and visual grounding failures.
tldr_zh: 本文介绍了一种门控感知-推理优化（GPRO）方法，它是一种用于大型视觉语言模型的元推理控制器，通过动态地在快速、感知和推理路径之间路由计算，提高准确性并提高效率，从而解决过度思考和视觉基础故障。
summary_zh: 大型视觉语言模型（LVLMs）已经通过生成逐步推理过程的思维链机制展现了强大的推理能力。然而，这种慢思考方法通常会导致过度思考，即模型即使对于简单的查询也会产生过于冗长的响应，从而导致测试时效率低下，甚至降低准确性。先前的工作试图通过自适应推理策略来缓解这个问题，但这些方法在很大程度上忽略了一个根本性的瓶颈：视觉感知失败。我们认为，稳定的推理关键取决于低层次的视觉基础，并且推理错误通常源于不完善的感知，而不是不足的审议。为了解决这个局限性，我们提出门控感知-推理优化（GPRO），一种元推理控制器，它在每个生成步骤中动态地在三个决策路径之间路由计算：一个轻量级的快速路径，一个用于重新检查视觉输入的慢速感知路径，以及一个用于内部自我反思的慢速推理路径。为了学习区分这三种路径，我们利用教师模型从大约79万个样本中推导出大规模的失败归因监督，以区分知觉幻觉和推理错误。然后，我们使用多目标强化学习训练控制器，以优化不确定性下任务准确性和计算成本之间的权衡。在五个基准测试上的实验表明，GPRO显著提高了准确性和效率，在生成明显更短的响应的同时，优于最近的慢思考方法。

title: Milestones over Outcome: Unlocking Geometric Reasoning with Sub-Goal Verifiable Reward
summary: Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) struggle with complex geometric reasoning, largely because "black box" outcome-based supervision fails to distinguish between lucky guesses and rigorous deduction. To address this, we introduce a paradigm shift towards subgoal-level evaluation and learning. We first construct GeoGoal, a benchmark synthesized via a rigorous formal verification data engine, which converts abstract proofs into verifiable numeric subgoals. This structure reveals a critical divergence between reasoning quality and outcome accuracy. Leveraging this, we propose the Sub-Goal Verifiable Reward (SGVR) framework, which replaces sparse signals with dense rewards based on the Skeleton Rate. Experiments demonstrate that SGVR not only enhances geometric performance (+9.7%) but also exhibits strong generalization, transferring gains to general math (+8.0%) and other general reasoning tasks (+2.8%), demonstrating broad applicability across diverse domains.
tldr: The paper introduces GeoGoal, a geometrically-focused benchmark, and Sub-Goal Verifiable Reward (SGVR) framework to enhance geometric reasoning in MLLMs by incorporating subgoal-level evaluation. SGVR demonstrates improved performance in geometric, mathematical, and general reasoning tasks.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了GeoGoal，一个专注于几何的基准，以及子目标可验证奖励（SGVR）框架，通过结合子目标级别的评估来提高MLLM中的几何推理能力. SGVR在几何、数学和一般推理任务中表现出改进的性能。
summary_zh: 多模态大型语言模型(MLLM)在复杂几何推理方面表现不佳，这主要是因为基于“黑盒”结果的监督无法区分侥幸猜中和严谨的推导。为了解决这个问题，我们引入了一种范式转变，转向子目标级别的评估和学习。我们首先构建了GeoGoal，这是一个通过严谨的形式化验证数据引擎合成的基准，它将抽象证明转化为可验证的数值子目标。这种结构揭示了推理质量和结果准确性之间的关键差异。利用这一点，我们提出了子目标可验证奖励（SGVR）框架，它使用基于骨架率的密集奖励来取代稀疏信号。实验表明，SGVR不仅增强了几何性能(+9.7%)，而且表现出强大的泛化能力，将收益转移到一般数学(+8.0%)和其他一般推理任务(+2.8%)，证明了其在不同领域的广泛适用性。

title: SKATER: Synthesized Kinematics for Advanced Traversing Efficiency on a Humanoid Robot via Roller Skate Swizzles
summary: Although recent years have seen significant progress of humanoid robots in walking and running, the frequent foot strikes with ground during these locomotion gaits inevitably generate high instantaneous impact forces, which leads to exacerbated joint wear and poor energy utilization. Roller skating, as a sport with substantial biomechanical value, can achieve fast and continuous sliding through rational utilization of body inertia, featuring minimal kinetic energy loss. Therefore, this study proposes a novel humanoid robot with each foot equipped with a row of four passive wheels for roller skating. A deep reinforcement learning control framework is also developed for the swizzle gait with the reward function design based on the intrinsic characteristics of roller skating. The learned policy is first analyzed in simulation and then deployed on the physical robot to demonstrate the smoothness and efficiency of the swizzle gait over traditional bipedal walking gait in terms of Impact Intensity and Cost of Transport during locomotion. A reduction of $75.86\%$ and $63.34\%$ of these two metrics indicate roller skating as a superior locomotion mode for enhanced energy efficiency and joint longevity.
tldr: This paper introduces a humanoid robot equipped with roller skates and controlled by deep reinforcement learning to achieve efficient locomotion via a swizzle gait, demonstrating significant reductions in impact intensity and cost of transport compared to traditional walking.
tldr_zh: 本文介绍了一种配备轮滑鞋的人形机器人，该机器人通过深度强化学习控制，以实现高效的回转步态运动。与传统的步行相比，实验表明其在冲击强度和运输成本方面显著降低。
summary_zh: 近年来，人形机器人在行走和跑步方面取得了显著进展，但这些移动步态中频繁的足部与地面撞击不可避免地产生高瞬时冲击力，导致关节磨损加剧和能量利用率低下。轮滑作为一项具有重要生物力学价值的运动，可以通过合理利用身体惯性实现快速且连续的滑动，其特点在于最小的动能损失。因此，本研究提出了一种新型人形机器人，其每只脚都配备一排四个被动轮子用于轮滑。此外，还开发了一种深度强化学习控制框架，用于实现剪式步态，其奖励函数的设计基于轮滑的内在特性。学习到的策略首先在仿真环境中进行分析，然后部署到物理机器人上，以展示剪式步态在运动过程中的冲击强度和能量消耗方面，相比传统双足行走步态的平稳性和效率。这两项指标分别降低了$75.86\%$和$63.34\%$，表明轮滑是一种更优的运动模式，可提高能量效率和关节寿命。

title: Optimizing Path Planning using Deep Reinforcement Learning for UGVs in Precision Agriculture
summary: This study focuses on optimizing path planning for unmanned ground vehicles (UGVs) in precision agriculture using deep reinforcement learning (DRL) techniques in continuous action spaces. The research begins with a review of traditional grid-based methods, such as A* and Dijkstra's algorithms, and discusses their limitations in dynamic agricultural environments, highlighting the need for adaptive learning strategies. The study then explores DRL approaches, including Deep Q-Networks (DQN), which demonstrate improved adaptability and performance in two-dimensional simulations. Enhancements such as Double Q-Networks and Dueling Networks are evaluated to further improve decision-making. Building on these results, the focus shifts to continuous action space models, specifically Deep Deterministic Policy Gradient (DDPG) and Twin Delayed Deep Deterministic Policy Gradient (TD3), which are tested in increasingly complex environments. Experiments conducted in a three-dimensional environment using ROS and Gazebo demonstrate the effectiveness of continuous DRL algorithms in navigating dynamic agricultural scenarios. Notably, the pretrained TD3 agent achieves a 95 percent success rate in dynamic environments, demonstrating the robustness of the proposed approach in handling moving obstacles while ensuring safety for both crops and the robot.
tldr: This paper explores the use of Deep Reinforcement Learning, particularly TD3, for optimizing UGV path planning in dynamic agricultural environments, achieving a 95% success rate in simulations.
tldr_zh: 本文探讨了使用深度强化学习，特别是TD3，来优化动态农业环境中无人地面车辆的路径规划，并在模拟中实现了95%的成功率。
summary_zh: 本研究侧重于利用深度强化学习（DRL）技术在连续动作空间中优化无人地面车辆（UGV）在精准农业中的路径规划。研究伊始，回顾了传统的基于栅格的方法，如A*算法和Dijkstra算法，并探讨了其在动态农业环境中的局限性，强调了对自适应学习策略的需求。随后，研究探讨了DRL方法，包括深度Q网络（DQN），其在二维仿真中表现出改进的适应性和性能。评估了双Q网络和竞争网络等增强方法，以进一步提高决策能力。基于这些结果，研究重点转移到连续动作空间模型，特别是深度确定性策略梯度（DDPG）和双延迟深度确定性策略梯度（TD3），并在日益复杂的环境中进行了测试。使用ROS和Gazebo在三维环境中进行的实验证明了连续型DRL算法在动态农业场景中导航的有效性。值得注意的是，预训练的TD3代理在动态环境中实现了95%的成功率，表明所提出的方法在处理移动障碍物的同时确保作物和机器人安全方面的鲁棒性。

title: UniBiDex: A Unified Teleoperation Framework for Robotic Bimanual Dexterous Manipulation
summary: We present UniBiDex a unified teleoperation framework for robotic bimanual dexterous manipulation that supports both VRbased and leaderfollower input modalities UniBiDex enables realtime contactrich dualarm teleoperation by integrating heterogeneous input devices into a shared control stack with consistent kinematic treatment and safety guarantees The framework employs nullspace control to optimize bimanual configurations ensuring smooth collisionfree and singularityaware motion across tasks We validate UniBiDex on a longhorizon kitchentidying task involving five sequential manipulation subtasks demonstrating higher task success rates smoother trajectories and improved robustness compared to strong baselines By releasing all hardware and software components as opensource we aim to lower the barrier to collecting largescale highquality human demonstration datasets and accelerate progress in robot learning.
tldr: The paper introduces UniBiDex, a unified teleoperation framework for robotic bimanual dexterous manipulation using VR and leader-follower modalities, validated on a kitchen-tidying task, and released as open source to facilitate robot learning research.
tldr_zh: 本文介绍了UniBiDex，一个统一的遥操作框架，用于机器人双臂灵巧操作，支持VR和leader-follower模式。该框架已通过厨房整理任务验证，并开源发布以促进机器人学习研究。
summary_zh: 我们提出了UniBiDex，一个统一的遥操作框架，用于机器人双臂灵巧操作，支持基于VR和主从控制的输入方式。UniBiDex通过将异构输入设备集成到具有一致运动学处理和安全保证的共享控制栈中，实现实时的、富接触的双臂遥操作。该框架采用零空间控制来优化双臂配置，确保跨任务的平滑、无碰撞和奇异点感知的运动。我们在一项涉及五个连续操作子任务的长时程厨房整理任务中验证了UniBiDex，与强基线相比，UniBiDex展示了更高的任务成功率、更平滑的轨迹和更高的鲁棒性。通过开源所有硬件和软件组件，我们旨在降低收集大规模、高质量人类演示数据集的门槛，并加速机器人学习的进展。

title: Transformer-based Multi-agent Reinforcement Learning for Separation Assurance in Structured and Unstructured Airspaces
summary: Conventional optimization-based metering depends on strict adherence to precomputed schedules, which limits the flexibility required for the stochastic operations of Advanced Air Mobility (AAM). In contrast, multi-agent reinforcement learning (MARL) offers a decentralized, adaptive framework that can better handle uncertainty, required for safe aircraft separation assurance. Despite this advantage, current MARL approaches often overfit to specific airspace structures, limiting their adaptability to new configurations. To improve generalization, we recast the MARL problem in a relative polar state space and train a transformer encoder model across diverse traffic patterns and intersection angles. The learned model provides speed advisories to resolve conflicts while maintaining aircraft near their desired cruising speeds. In our experiments, we evaluated encoder depths of 1, 2, and 3 layers in both structured and unstructured airspaces, and found that a single encoder configuration outperformed deeper variants, yielding near-zero near mid-air collision rates and shorter loss-of-separation infringements than the deeper configurations. Additionally, we showed that the same configuration outperforms a baseline model designed purely with attention. Together, our results suggest that the newly formulated state representation, novel design of neural network architecture, and proposed training strategy provide an adaptable and scalable decentralized solution for aircraft separation assurance in both structured and unstructured airspaces.
tldr: This paper presents a transformer-based multi-agent reinforcement learning approach for aircraft separation assurance, demonstrating its adaptability and scalability in both structured and unstructured airspaces. It proposes a novel state representation and a specific neural network architecture for improved performance.
tldr_zh: 本文提出了一种基于Transformer的多智能体强化学习方法，用于飞机间隔保证，展示了其在结构化和非结构化空域中的适应性和可扩展性。它提出了一种新的状态表示和一种特定的神经网络架构，以提高性能。
summary_zh: 基于传统优化的流量控制依赖于严格遵守预先计算好的计划，这限制了先进空中交通（AAM）随机运行所需的灵活性。相比之下，多智能体强化学习（MARL）提供了一种去中心化、自适应的框架，可以更好地处理不确定性，这对于安全飞机间隔保障至关重要。尽管具有这一优势，但当前的MARL方法通常过度拟合于特定的空域结构，限制了它们对新配置的适应性。为了提高泛化能力，我们将MARL问题重构在相对极坐标状态空间中，并在各种不同的交通模式和交叉角度下训练一个Transformer编码器模型。学习到的模型提供速度建议，以解决冲突，同时保持飞机接近其期望巡航速度。在我们的实验中，我们评估了编码器深度分别为1、2和3层的模型在结构化和非结构化空域中的表现，发现单层编码器配置优于更深层的变体，产生的空中接近相撞事件率接近于零，且间隔损失侵犯程度比更深层的配置更短。此外，我们还表明，相同的配置优于纯粹使用注意力机制设计的基线模型。总之，我们的结果表明，新提出的状态表示、新型神经网络架构设计以及所提出的训练策略为结构化和非结构化空域中的飞机间隔保障提供了一个适应性强且可扩展的去中心化解决方案。

title: Choreographing a World of Dynamic Objects
summary: Dynamic objects in our physical 4D (3D + time) world are constantly evolving, deforming, and interacting with other objects, leading to diverse 4D scene dynamics. In this paper, we present a universal generative pipeline, CHORD, for CHOReographing Dynamic objects and scenes and synthesizing this type of phenomena. Traditional rule-based graphics pipelines to create these dynamics are based on category-specific heuristics, yet are labor-intensive and not scalable. Recent learning-based methods typically demand large-scale datasets, which may not cover all object categories in interest. Our approach instead inherits the universality from the video generative models by proposing a distillation-based pipeline to extract the rich Lagrangian motion information hidden in the Eulerian representations of 2D videos. Our method is universal, versatile, and category-agnostic. We demonstrate its effectiveness by conducting experiments to generate a diverse range of multi-body 4D dynamics, show its advantage compared to existing methods, and demonstrate its applicability in generating robotics manipulation policies. Project page: https://yanzhelyu.github.io/chord
tldr: The paper presents CHORD, a universal generative pipeline for creating dynamic 4D scenes by distilling Lagrangian motion information from 2D videos, showcasing its versatility across various multi-body interactions and robotics applications without relying on category-specific heuristics or large datasets.
tldr_zh: 本文介绍了一种名为CHORD的通用生成流程，用于创建动态4D场景。该流程通过提取2D视频中的拉格朗日运动信息来实现，无需依赖特定类别的启发式方法或大型数据集，并在各种多物体交互和机器人应用中展示了其通用性。
summary_zh: 我们物理四维（3D + 时间）世界中的动态物体 постоянно演化、形变，并与其他物体互动，从而导致各种各样的四维场景动态。在本文中，我们 提出一种通用的生成式流程 CHORD，用于编排（CHOReographing）动态物体和场景，并合成此类现象。 传统的基于规则的图形学流程，通过特定于类别的启发式方法来创建这些动态，但其本质上劳动密集且难以扩展。 最近基于学习的方法通常需要大规模数据集，而这些数据集可能无法覆盖所有感兴趣的物体类别。 我们的方法借鉴了视频生成模型的通用性，提出一种基于知识蒸馏的流程，从二维视频的欧拉表示中提取隐藏的丰富的拉格朗日运动信息。 我们的方法是通用的、多功能的，并且与类别无关。 我们通过进行实验来生成各种多体四维动态，展示了其有效性，表明了其相比于现有方法的优势，并展示了其在生成机器人操作策略方面的适用性。 项目主页： https://yanzhelyu.github.io/chord

title: Hierarchical GNN-Based Multi-Agent Learning for Dynamic Queue-Jump Lane and Emergency Vehicle Corridor Formation
summary: Emergency vehicles require rapid passage through congested traffic, yet existing strategies fail to adapt to dynamic conditions. We propose a novel hierarchical graph neural network (GNN)-based multi-agent reinforcement learning framework to coordinate connected vehicles for emergency corridor formation. Our approach uses a high-level planner for global strategy and low-level controllers for trajectory execution, utilizing graph attention networks to scale with variable agent counts. Trained via Multi-Agent Proximal Policy Optimization (MAPPO), the system reduces emergency vehicle travel time by 28.3% compared to baselines and 44.6% compared to uncoordinated traffic in simulations. The design achieves near-zero collision rates (0.3%) while maintaining 81% of background traffic efficiency. Ablation and generalization studies confirm the framework's robustness across diverse scenarios. These results demonstrate the effectiveness of combining GNNs with hierarchical learning for intelligent transportation systems.
tldr: This paper introduces a hierarchical GNN-based multi-agent reinforcement learning framework for dynamic queue-jump lane and emergency vehicle corridor formation, significantly reducing emergency vehicle travel time while maintaining background traffic efficiency in simulations.
tldr_zh: 本文提出了一种基于分层GNN的多智能体强化学习框架，用于动态排队跳跃车道和应急车辆走廊的形成。该方法在仿真中显著减少了应急车辆的行驶时间，同时保持了背景交通的效率。
summary_zh: 紧急车辆需要在拥堵的交通中快速通行，但现有策略无法适应动态变化的路况。我们提出了一种新颖的基于分层图神经网络（GNN）的多智能体强化学习框架，以协调联网车辆，形成紧急通道。我们的方法使用高级规划器进行全局策略制定，并使用低级控制器进行轨迹执行，利用图注意力网络来扩展适应可变的智能体数量。通过多智能体近端策略优化（MAPPO）训练，该系统在模拟中将急救车辆的通行时间相比基线减少了28.3%，相比无协调的交通减少了44.6%。该设计实现了接近零的碰撞率（0.3%），同时保持了81%的背景交通效率。消融和泛化研究证实了该框架在各种场景中的鲁棒性。这些结果表明了GNN与分层学习相结合在智能交通系统中的有效性。

title: Safe Continual Reinforcement Learning Methods for Nonstationary Environments. Towards a Survey of the State of the Art
summary:
This work provides a state-of-the-art survey of continual safe online reinforcement learning (COSRL) methods. We discuss theoretical aspects, challenges, and open questions in building continual online safe reinforcement learning algorithms. We provide the taxonomy and the details of continual online safe reinforcement learning methods based on the type of safe learning mechanism that takes adaptation to nonstationarity into account. We categorize safety constraints formulation for online reinforcement learning algorithms, and finally, we discuss prospects for creating reliable, safe online learning algorithms.
  Keywords: safe RL in nonstationary environments, safe continual reinforcement learning under nonstationarity, HM-MDP, NSMDP, POMDP, safe POMDP, constraints for continual learning, safe continual reinforcement learning review, safe continual reinforcement learning survey, safe continual reinforcement learning, safe online learning under distribution shift, safe continual online adaptation, safe reinforcement learning, safe exploration, safe adaptation, constrained Markov decision processes, safe reinforcement learning, partially observable Markov decision process, safe reinforcement learning and hidden Markov decision processes, Safe Online Reinforcement Learning, safe online reinforcement learning, safe online reinforcement learning, safe meta-learning, safe meta-reinforcement learning, safe context-based reinforcement learning, formulating safety constraints for continual learning
tldr: This paper surveys continual safe online reinforcement learning (COSRL) methods, discussing theoretical aspects, challenges, safety constraints and open questions in nonstationary environments.
tldr_zh: 本文综述了持续安全在线强化学习（COSRL）方法，讨论了非平稳环境下的理论方面、挑战、安全约束和开放性问题。
summary_zh:
本工作对持续安全在线强化学习（COSRL）方法进行了最先进的综述。我们讨论了构建持续在线安全强化学习算法的理论方面、挑战和开放性问题。我们提供了一个分类系统，并详细阐述了基于安全学习机制类型的持续在线安全强化学习方法，这些方法考虑了对非平稳性的适应。我们对在线强化学习算法的安全约束形式化进行了分类，最后，我们讨论了创建可靠、安全的在线学习算法的前景。
关键词：非平稳环境下的安全强化学习，非平稳性下的安全持续强化学习，HM-MDP，NSMDP，POMDP，安全POMDP，持续学习约束，安全持续强化学习综述，安全持续强化学习调查，安全持续强化学习，分布偏移下的安全在线学习，安全持续在线适应，安全强化学习，安全探索，安全适应，约束马尔可夫决策过程，安全强化学习，部分可观测马尔可夫决策过程，安全强化学习与隐马尔可夫决策过程，安全在线强化学习，安全在线强化学习，安全在线强化学习，安全元学习，安全元强化学习，安全基于上下文的强化学习，持续学习的安全约束形式化

title: Controllable Memory Usage: Balancing Anchoring and Innovation in Long-Term Human-Agent Interaction
summary: As LLM-based agents are increasingly used in long-term interactions, cumulative memory is critical for enabling personalization and maintaining stylistic consistency. However, most existing systems adopt an ``all-or-nothing'' approach to memory usage: incorporating all relevant past information can lead to \textit{Memory Anchoring}, where the agent is trapped by past interactions, while excluding memory entirely results in under-utilization and the loss of important interaction history. We show that an agent's reliance on memory can be modeled as an explicit and user-controllable dimension. We first introduce a behavioral metric of memory dependence to quantify the influence of past interactions on current outputs. We then propose \textbf{Stee}rable \textbf{M}emory Agent, \texttt{SteeM}, a framework that allows users to dynamically regulate memory reliance, ranging from a fresh-start mode that promotes innovation to a high-fidelity mode that closely follows interaction history. Experiments across different scenarios demonstrate that our approach consistently outperforms conventional prompting and rigid memory masking strategies, yielding a more nuanced and effective control for personalized human-agent collaboration.
tldr: This paper introduces SteeM, a framework for controlling memory reliance in LLM-based agents, allowing users to balance memory anchoring and innovation in long-term interactions. It uses a quantifiable metric for memory dependence and outperforms traditional methods.
tldr_zh: 本文介绍SteeM，一个用于控制LLM代理中记忆依赖性的框架，允许用户在长期交互中平衡记忆锚定和创新。它使用可量化的记忆依赖性指标，并且优于传统方法。
summary_zh: 基于大型语言模型的智能体越来越多地应用于长期交互场景，累积记忆对于实现个性化和保持风格一致性至关重要。然而，现有的大多数系统对记忆的使用采取“非此即彼”的方式：纳入所有相关的历史信息可能导致\textit{记忆锚定}，使得智能体受困于过往交互；而完全排除记忆则会导致利用不足和重要交互历史的丢失。我们证明了智能体对记忆的依赖程度可以被建模为一个显式且用户可控的维度。我们首先引入一个记忆依赖性的行为度量指标，以量化过去交互对当前输出的影响。然后，我们提出\textbf{可控} \textbf{记}忆智能体，\texttt{SteeM}，一个允许用户动态调节记忆依赖性的框架，其范围可以从促进创新的全新开始模式到紧密遵循交互历史的高保真模式。在不同场景下的实验结果表明，我们的方法始终优于传统的提示（prompting）和刚性记忆掩蔽策略，从而为个性化的人机协作提供了更细致和有效的控制。

title: From Idea to Co-Creation: A Planner-Actor-Critic Framework for Agent Augmented 3D Modeling
summary: We present a framework that extends the Actor-Critic architecture to creative 3D modeling through multi-agent self-reflection and human-in-the-loop supervision. While existing approaches rely on single-prompt agents that directly execute modeling commands via tools like Blender MCP, our approach introduces a Planner-Actor-Critic architecture. In this design, the Planner coordinates modeling steps, the Actor executes them, and the Critic provides iterative feedback, while human users act as supervisors and advisors throughout the process. Through systematic comparison between single-prompt modeling and our reflective multi-agent approach, we demonstrate improvements in geometric accuracy, aesthetic quality, and task completion rates across diverse 3D modeling scenarios. Our evaluation reveals that critic-guided reflection, combined with human supervisory input, reduces modeling errors and increases complexity and quality of the result compared to direct single-prompt execution. This work establishes that structured agent self-reflection, when augmented by human oversight and advisory guidance, produces higher-quality 3D models while maintaining efficient workflow integration through real-time Blender synchronization.
tldr: This paper proposes a Planner-Actor-Critic framework for 3D modeling, using multi-agent self-reflection and human-in-the-loop supervision to improve geometric accuracy, aesthetic quality, and task completion rates compared to single-prompt modeling.
tldr_zh: 本文提出了一种用于 3D 建模的 Planner-Actor-Critic 框架，该框架利用多智能体自我反思和人机监督来提高几何精度、美学质量和任务完成率，与单提示建模相比有所改进。
summary_zh: 我们提出了一个框架，该框架将Actor-Critic架构扩展到创造性的3D建模领域，通过多智能体自我反思和人机环路监督实现。现有的方法依赖于单一提示智能体，它们通过Blender MCP等工具直接执行建模命令，而我们的方法引入了一种Planner-Actor-Critic架构。在这个设计中，Planner协调建模步骤，Actor执行这些步骤，Critic提供迭代反馈，而人类用户在整个过程中充当监督者和顾问。通过单一提示建模与我们的反思性多智能体方法之间的系统比较，我们证明了在不同的3D建模场景中，几何精度、美学质量和任务完成率均有所提高。我们的评估表明，在人工监督输入的支持下，Critic引导的反思可以减少建模误差，并提高结果的复杂性和质量，优于直接的单一提示执行。这项工作证实，在人工监督和引导的增强下，结构化的智能体自我反思能够生成更高质量的3D模型，同时通过实时的Blender同步来保持高效的工作流程集成。

title: Flexible Manufacturing Systems Intralogistics: Dynamic Optimization of AGVs and Tool Sharing Using Coloured-Timed Petri Nets and Actor-Critic RL with Actions Masking
summary: Flexible Manufacturing Systems (FMS) are pivotal in optimizing production processes in today's rapidly evolving manufacturing landscape. This paper advances the traditional job shop scheduling problem by incorporating additional complexities through the simultaneous integration of automated guided vehicles (AGVs) and tool-sharing systems. We propose a novel approach that combines Colored-Timed Petri Nets (CTPNs) with actor-critic model-based reinforcement learning (MBRL), effectively addressing the multifaceted challenges associated with FMS. CTPNs provide a formal modeling structure and dynamic action masking, significantly reducing the action search space, while MBRL ensures adaptability to changing environments through the learned policy. Leveraging the advantages of MBRL, we incorporate a lookahead strategy for optimal positioning of AGVs, improving operational efficiency. Our approach was evaluated on small-sized public benchmarks and a newly developed large-scale benchmark inspired by the Taillard benchmark. The results show that our approach matches traditional methods on smaller instances and outperforms them on larger ones in terms of makespan while achieving a tenfold reduction in computation time. To ensure reproducibility, we propose a gym-compatible environment and an instance generator. Additionally, an ablation study evaluates the contribution of each framework component to its overall performance.
tldr: This paper introduces a novel approach combining Colored-Timed Petri Nets and model-based reinforcement learning with action masking for optimizing AGV and tool sharing in Flexible Manufacturing Systems, demonstrating performance improvements on large-scale benchmarks with reduced computation time.
tldr_zh: 本文提出了一种新颖的方法，结合了着色时间 Petri 网和基于模型的强化学习（具有动作掩蔽），用于优化柔性制造系统中 AGV 和工具的共享。该方法在大规模基准测试中表现出性能的提升，并且计算时间减少。
summary_zh: 柔性制造系统（FMS）在当今快速发展的制造业环境中对于优化生产流程至关重要。本文通过同时集成自动导引车（AGV）和刀具共享系统，进一步拓展了传统的车间作业调度问题。我们提出了一种新颖的方法，将着色时间Petri网（CTPN）与基于模型Actor-Critic强化学习（MBRL）相结合，有效应对了与FMS相关的多方面挑战。CTPN提供了一种正式的建模结构和动态动作屏蔽，显著缩小了动作搜索空间，而MBRL则通过学习到的策略确保了对变化环境的适应性。利用MBRL的优势，我们纳入了一种前瞻策略，用于AGV的最佳定位，从而提高了运营效率。我们的方法在小型公共基准测试和一个新开发的大规模基准测试（灵感来自Taillard基准测试）上进行了评估。结果表明，我们的方法在较小规模的实例上与传统方法相当，但在较大规模的实例上在完工时间方面优于它们，同时计算时间减少了一个数量级。为了确保可重复性，我们提出了一个Gym兼容环境和一个实例生成器。此外，一项消融研究评估了每个框架组件对其整体性能的贡献。

title: TourPlanner: A Competitive Consensus Framework with Constraint-Gated Reinforcement Learning for Travel Planning
summary: Travel planning is a sophisticated decision-making process that requires synthesizing multifaceted information to construct itineraries. However, existing travel planning approaches face several challenges: (1) Pruning candidate points of interest (POIs) while maintaining a high recall rate; (2) A single reasoning path restricts the exploration capability within the feasible solution space for travel planning; (3) Simultaneously optimizing hard constraints and soft constraints remains a significant difficulty. To address these challenges, we propose TourPlanner, a comprehensive framework featuring multi-path reasoning and constraint-gated reinforcement learning. Specifically, we first introduce a Personalized Recall and Spatial Optimization (PReSO) workflow to construct spatially-aware candidate POIs' set. Subsequently, we propose Competitive consensus Chain-of-Thought (CCoT), a multi-path reasoning paradigm that improves the ability of exploring the feasible solution space. To further refine the plan, we integrate a sigmoid-based gating mechanism into the reinforcement learning stage, which dynamically prioritizes soft-constraint satisfaction only after hard constraints are met. Experimental results on travel planning benchmarks demonstrate that TourPlanner achieves state-of-the-art performance, significantly surpassing existing methods in both feasibility and user-preference alignment.
tldr: The paper introduces TourPlanner, a framework combining multi-path reasoning and constraint-gated reinforcement learning to improve travel planning by addressing challenges in POI selection, solution space exploration, and constraint optimization, achieving state-of-the-art results.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了 TourPlanner，一个结合多路径推理和约束门控强化学习的框架，通过解决兴趣点选择、解空间探索和约束优化中的挑战，改进了旅行计划，并取得了最先进的结果。
summary_zh: 旅游规划是一个复杂的决策过程，需要综合多方面的信息来构建行程。然而，现有的旅游规划方法面临着几个挑战：（1）在保持高召回率的同时，修剪候选的兴趣点（POI）；（2）单一的推理路径限制了在旅游规划可行解空间内的探索能力；（3）同时优化硬约束和软约束仍然是一个显著的难点。为了解决这些挑战，我们提出了TourPlanner，一个以多路径推理和约束门控强化学习为特色的综合框架。具体来说，我们首先引入了一个个性化召回和空间优化（PReSO）工作流程，以构建空间感知的候选POI集合。随后，我们提出了竞争共识链式思考（CCoT），一种多路径推理范式，提高了探索可行解空间的能力。为了进一步优化规划，我们将基于Sigmoid的门控机制集成到强化学习阶段，该机制仅在满足硬约束之后才动态地优先考虑软约束的满足。在旅游规划基准上的实验结果表明，TourPlanner实现了最先进的性能，在可行性和用户偏好对齐方面均显著超越了现有方法。

title: Tape: A Cellular Automata Benchmark for Evaluating Rule-Shift Generalization in Reinforcement Learning
summary: We present Tape, a controlled reinforcement-learning benchmark designed to isolate out-of-distribution (OOD) failure under latent rule shifts.Tape is derived from one-dimensional cellular automata, enabling precise train/test splits where observation and action spaces are held fixed while transition rules change. Using a reproducible evaluation pipeline, we compare model-free baselines, model-based planning with learned world models, and task-inference (meta-RL) methods. A consistent pattern emerges: methods that are strong in-distribution (ID) can collapse under heldout-rule OOD, and high-variance OOD evaluation can make rankings unstable unless experiments are sufficiently replicated.We provide (i) standardized OOD protocols, (ii) statistical reporting requirements (seeds, confidence intervals, and hypothesis tests), and (iii) information-theoretic identities connecting entropy reduction to conditional mutual information and expected posterior KL divergence, clarifying what "uncertainty reduction" objectives can and cannot guarantee under rule shifts.
tldr: The paper introduces Tape, a reinforcement learning benchmark based on cellular automata, designed to evaluate out-of-distribution generalization under rule shifts, and then analyzes the performance of various RL methods on this benchmark including model-free, model-based, and meta-RL methods.
tldr_zh: 该论文提出了Tape，一个基于细胞自动机的强化学习基准，旨在评估在规则转移下的分布外泛化能力，并分析了各种强化学习方法在该基准测试中的表现，包括无模型、基于模型和元强化学习方法。
summary_zh: 我们提出了 Tape，这是一个受控的强化学习基准，旨在隔离潜在规则转移下的分布外（OOD）失效。Tape 源自一维细胞自动机，能够精确区分训练/测试集，其中观察和动作空间保持不变，而转移规则发生变化。通过可重现的评估流程，我们比较了无模型基线、基于学习世界模型的模型规划以及任务推断（元强化学习）方法。一个一致的模式显现：在分布内（ID）表现强大的方法在留出规则的 OOD 情形下可能会崩溃，并且高方差的 OOD 评估可能导致排名不稳定，除非实验得到充分的重复。我们提供 (i) 标准化的 OOD 协议，(ii) 统计报告要求（种子、置信区间和假设检验），以及 (iii) 将熵减少与条件互信息和期望后验 KL 散度联系起来的信息论恒等式，阐明了在规则转移下，“不确定性减少”目标能够和不能保证什么。

title: Scaling Behavior Cloning Improves Causal Reasoning: An Open Model for Real-Time Video Game Playing
summary: Behavior cloning is enjoying a resurgence in popularity as scaling both model and data sizes proves to provide a strong starting point for many tasks of interest. In this work, we introduce an open recipe for training a video game playing foundation model designed for inference in realtime on a consumer GPU. We release all data (8300+ hours of high quality human gameplay), training and inference code, and pretrained checkpoints under an open license. We show that our best model is capable of playing a variety of 3D video games at a level competitive with human play. We use this recipe to systematically examine the scaling laws of behavior cloning to understand how the model's performance and causal reasoning varies with model and data scale. We first show in a simple toy problem that, for some types of causal reasoning, increasing both the amount of training data and the depth of the network results in the model learning a more causal policy. We then systematically study how causality varies with the number of parameters (and depth) and training steps in scaled models of up to 1.2 billion parameters, and we find similar scaling results to what we observe in the toy problem.
tldr: This paper introduces an open-source behavior cloning model for real-time video game playing, demonstrating improved causal reasoning with increased model and data scale, and releasing a large dataset and related code.
tldr_zh: 本文介绍了一个用于实时视频游戏行为克隆的开源模型，展示了随着模型和数据规模的增加，因果推理能力得到了提升，并发布了一个大型数据集和相关代码。
summary_zh: 行为克隆正迎来新一轮的流行，因为扩展模型和数据规模已被证明是许多目标任务的强大起点。 在这项工作中，我们介绍了一个开放配方，用于训练一个视频游戏游玩的基石模型，该模型旨在在消费级GPU上进行实时推理。 我们以开放许可发布所有数据（超过8300小时的高质量人类游戏数据）、训练和推理代码以及预训练检查点。 我们证明，我们最好的模型能够以与人类玩家相媲美的水平游玩各种3D视频游戏。 我们使用此配方系统地研究行为克隆的缩放定律，以了解模型的性能和因果推理如何随模型和数据规模变化。 首先，我们在一个简单的玩具问题中表明，对于某些类型的因果推理，增加训练数据量和网络深度会导致模型学习到更具因果性的策略。 然后，我们系统地研究因果性如何随参数数量（和深度）和训练步骤在高达12亿参数的缩放模型中变化，并且我们发现与我们在玩具问题中观察到的类似的缩放结果。

title: BackdoorAgent: A Unified Framework for Backdoor Attacks on LLM-based Agents
summary: Large language model (LLM) agents execute tasks through multi-step workflows that combine planning, memory, and tool use. While this design enables autonomy, it also expands the attack surface for backdoor threats. Backdoor triggers injected into specific stages of an agent workflow can persist through multiple intermediate states and adversely influence downstream outputs. However, existing studies remain fragmented and typically analyze individual attack vectors in isolation, leaving the cross-stage interaction and propagation of backdoor triggers poorly understood from an agent-centric perspective. To fill this gap, we propose \textbf{BackdoorAgent}, a modular and stage-aware framework that provides a unified, agent-centric view of backdoor threats in LLM agents. BackdoorAgent structures the attack surface into three functional stages of agentic workflows, including \textbf{planning attacks}, \textbf{memory attacks}, and \textbf{tool-use attacks}, and instruments agent execution to enable systematic analysis of trigger activation and propagation across different stages. Building on this framework, we construct a standardized benchmark spanning four representative agent applications: \textbf{Agent QA}, \textbf{Agent Code}, \textbf{Agent Web}, and \textbf{Agent Drive}, covering both language-only and multimodal settings. Our empirical analysis shows that \textit{triggers implanted at a single stage can persist across multiple steps and propagate through intermediate states.} For instance, when using a GPT-based backbone, we observe trigger persistence in 43.58\% of planning attacks, 77.97\% of memory attacks, and 60.28\% of tool-stage attacks, highlighting the vulnerabilities of the agentic workflow itself to backdoor threats. To facilitate reproducibility and future research, our code and benchmark are publicly available at GitHub.
tldr: The paper introduces BackdoorAgent, a framework to analyze and benchmark backdoor attacks in LLM-based agents across planning, memory, and tool-use stages, demonstrating the persistence of triggers across multiple steps.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了一个名为BackdoorAgent的框架，用于分析和评估基于LLM的Agent中存在的后门攻击，涵盖规划、记忆和工具使用阶段，并展示了触发器在多个步骤中的持久性。
summary_zh: 大型语言模型（LLM）智能体通过结合规划、记忆和工具使用的多步骤工作流程来执行任务。这种设计在实现自主性的同时，也扩大了后门威胁的攻击面。注入到智能体工作流程特定阶段的后门触发器可以持续存在于多个中间状态中，并对下游输出产生不利影响。然而，现有的研究仍然零散，通常孤立地分析单个攻击向量，导致从智能体中心的角度来看，对跨阶段交互和后门触发器的传播理解不足。为了弥合这一差距，我们提出了\textbf{BackdoorAgent}，这是一个模块化且阶段感知的框架，它提供了一个统一的、以智能体为中心的LLM智能体后门威胁视角。BackdoorAgent将攻击面结构化为智能体工作流程的三个功能阶段，包括\textbf{规划攻击}、\textbf{记忆攻击}和\textbf{工具使用攻击}，并对智能体执行进行仪器化，以便对不同阶段的触发器激活和传播进行系统分析。在此框架的基础上，我们构建了一个标准化的基准测试，涵盖了四个具有代表性的智能体应用：\textbf{智能体问答}、 \textbf{智能体代码}、\textbf{智能体网页}和\textbf{智能体驱动}，涵盖了纯语言和多模态设置。我们的实证分析表明，\textit{在单个阶段植入的触发器可以在多个步骤中持续存在并通过中间状态传播。} 例如，当使用基于GPT的骨干网络时，我们观察到规划攻击中有43.58％的触发器持久性，记忆攻击中有77.97％的触发器持久性，工具阶段攻击中有60.28％的触发器持久性，突出了智能体工作流程本身对后门威胁的脆弱性。为了方便重现性和未来的研究，我们的代码和基准测试已在GitHub上公开。

title: CircuitLM: A Multi-Agent LLM-Aided Design Framework for Generating Circuit Schematics from Natural Language Prompts
summary: Generating accurate circuit schematics from high-level natural language descriptions remains a persistent challenge in electronics design, as large language models (LLMs) frequently hallucinate in granular details, violate electrical constraints, and produce non-machine-readable outputs. We present CircuitLM, a novel multi-agent LLM-aided circuit design pipeline that translates user prompts into structured, visually interpretable CircuitJSON schematics through five sequential stages: (i) LLM-based component identification, (ii) canonical pinout retrieval, (iii) chain-of-thought reasoning by an electronics expert agent, (iv) JSON schematic synthesis, and (v) force-directed SVG visualization. Anchored by a curated, embedding-powered component knowledge base. While LLMs often violate electrical constraints, CircuitLM bridges this gap by grounding generation in a verified and dynamically extensible component database, initially comprising 50 components. To ensure safety, we incorporate a hybrid evaluation framework, namely Dual-Metric Circuit Validation (DMCV), validated against human-expert assessments, which achieves high fidelity in microcontroller-centric designs. We evaluate the system on 100 diverse embedded-systems prompts across six LLMs and introduce DMCV to assess both structural and electrical validity. This work bridges natural language input to deployable hardware designs, enabling reliable circuit prototyping by non-experts. Our code and data will be made public upon acceptance.
tldr: CircuitLM is a multi-agent LLM framework for generating circuit schematics from natural language, using a verified component database and a dual-metric validation framework to address LLM hallucination and constraint violations.
tldr_zh: CircuitLM是一个多智能体LLM框架，用于从自然语言生成电路原理图，它使用经过验证的组件数据库和双重指标验证框架来解决LLM产生幻觉和违反约束的问题。
summary_zh: 从高级自然语言描述生成准确的电路原理图一直是电子设计领域的一项挑战，因为大型语言模型（LLM）常常在细节上产生幻觉，违反电气约束，并生成非机器可读的输出。我们提出了CircuitLM，一种新型的基于多智能体LLM辅助的电路设计流水线，它通过五个顺序阶段将用户提示转化为结构化的、视觉上可解释的CircuitJSON原理图：（i）基于LLM的元件识别，（ii）规范引脚信息检索，（iii）由电子专家代理进行的思维链式推理，（iv）JSON原理图合成，以及（v）力导向SVG可视化。此流水线以一个精选的、由嵌入式驱动的元件知识库为基础。虽然LLM经常违反电气约束，但CircuitLM通过将生成过程锚定在一个经过验证且可动态扩展的元件数据库中来弥合这一差距，该数据库最初包含50个元件。为了确保安全性，我们引入了一个混合评估框架，即双指标电路验证（DMCV），它经过与人类专家评估的验证，在以微控制器为中心的设计中实现了高保真度。我们在包含六个LLM的100个不同的嵌入式系统提示上评估了该系统，并引入了DMCV来评估结构和电气有效性。这项工作将自然语言输入桥接到可部署的硬件设计，实现了由非专业人士进行的可靠电路原型设计。我们的代码和数据将在接受后公开。

title: 3D-Agent:Tri-Modal Multi-Agent Collaboration for Scalable 3D Object Annotation
summary: Driven by applications in autonomous driving robotics and augmented reality 3D object annotation presents challenges beyond 2D annotation including spatial complexity occlusion and viewpoint inconsistency Existing approaches based on single models often struggle to address these issues effectively We propose Tri MARF a novel framework that integrates tri modal inputs including 2D multi view images textual descriptions and 3D point clouds within a multi agent collaborative architecture to enhance large scale 3D annotation Tri MARF consists of three specialized agents a vision language model agent for generating multi view descriptions an information aggregation agent for selecting optimal descriptions and a gating agent that aligns textual semantics with 3D geometry for refined captioning Extensive experiments on Objaverse LVIS Objaverse XL and ABO demonstrate that Tri MARF substantially outperforms existing methods achieving a CLIPScore of 88 point 7 compared to prior state of the art methods retrieval accuracy of 45 point 2 and 43 point 8 on ViLT R at 5 and a throughput of up to 12000 objects per hour on a single NVIDIA A100 GPU
tldr: This paper introduces Tri-MARF, a multi-agent framework using vision-language models and 3D point clouds for scalable 3D object annotation, demonstrating significant improvements in CLIPScore, retrieval accuracy, and throughput compared to existing methods.
tldr_zh: 本文提出了一种名为Tri-MARF的多智能体框架，该框架利用视觉-语言模型和3D点云实现可扩展的3D对象标注，并在CLIPScore，检索准确率和吞吐量方面均优于现有方法。
summary_zh: 受自动驾驶、机器人技术和增强现实应用驱动，3D对象标注呈现出超越2D标注的挑战，包括空间复杂性、遮挡和视角不一致。现有基于单一模型的方法通常难以有效解决这些问题。我们提出Tri MARF，一种新颖的框架，它在多智能体协作架构中整合三模态输入，包括2D多视角图像、文本描述和3D点云，以增强大规模3D标注。Tri MARF由三个专门的智能体组成：一个用于生成多视角描述的视觉-语言模型智能体、一个用于选择最佳描述的信息聚合智能体，以及一个用于对齐文本语义和3D几何以进行精细化描述的门控智能体。在Objaverse、LVIS、Objaverse-XL和ABO上的大量实验表明，Tri MARF显著优于现有方法，实现了CLIPScore 88.7，相比之前的最先进方法，ViLT R@5的检索准确率分别达到45.2和43.8，并且在单张NVIDIA A100 GPU上每小时可处理高达12000个对象。

title: ParaCodex: A Profiling-Guided Autonomous Coding Agent for Reliable Parallel Code Generation and Translation
summary:
Parallel programming is central to HPC and AI, but producing code that is correct and fast remains challenging, especially for OpenMP GPU offload, where data movement and tuning dominate. Autonomous coding agents can compile, test, and profile on target hardware, but outputs are brittle without domain scaffolding.
  We present ParaCodex, an HPC-engineer workflow that turns a Codex-based agent into an autonomous OpenMP GPU offload system using staged hotspot analysis, explicit data planning, correctness gating, and profiling-guided refinement. We evaluate translation from serial CPU kernels to OpenMP GPU offload kernels on HeCBench, Rodinia, and NAS. After excluding five kernels, ParaCodex succeeded on all 31 valid kernels. The generated kernels improved GPU time over reference OpenMP implementations in 25/31 cases, achieving geometric-mean speedups of 3x on HeCBench and 5x on Rodinia, and outperforming a zero-shot Codex baseline on all suites. We also evaluate CUDA to OpenMP offload translation on ParEval, where ParaCodex maintains high compilation and validation rates in code-only and end-to-end settings.
tldr: ParaCodex is an autonomous coding agent that leverages profiling and staged analysis to automatically translate and optimize serial CPU kernels to OpenMP GPU offload kernels, achieving significant speedups compared to reference implementations.
tldr_zh: ParaCodex是一个自主编码代理，它利用分析和分阶段分析来自动将串行CPU内核翻译和优化为OpenMP GPU卸载内核，与参考实现相比实现了显著的加速。
summary_zh:
并行编程是HPC和AI的核心，但生成正确且快速的代码仍然具有挑战性，特别是对于OpenMP GPU卸载，其中数据移动和调优占据主导地位。自主编码代理可以在目标硬件上编译、测试和分析性能，但如果没有领域支撑，输出结果会很脆弱。

我们提出了ParaCodex，一种HPC工程师工作流程，它将基于Codex的代理转变为一个自主的OpenMP GPU卸载系统，该系统使用分阶段的热点分析、显式数据规划、正确性门控和性能分析指导的优化。我们评估了在HeCBench、Rodinia和NAS上从串行CPU内核到OpenMP GPU卸载内核的转换。在排除五个内核后，ParaCodex成功完成了所有31个有效内核的转换。所生成的内核在25/31个案例中提高了GPU时间，超过了参考OpenMP实现，在HeCBench上实现了3倍的几何平均加速，在Rodinia上实现了5倍的几何平均加速，并且在所有套件上都优于零样本Codex基线。我们还在ParEval上评估了CUDA到OpenMP卸载的转换，其中ParaCodex在纯代码和端到端设置中均保持了较高的编译和验证率。

title: Detector-Augmented SAMURAI for Long-Duration Drone Tracking
summary: Robust long-term tracking of drone is a critical requirement for modern surveillance systems, given their increasing threat potential. While detector-based approaches typically achieve strong frame-level accuracy, they often suffer from temporal inconsistencies caused by frequent detection dropouts. Despite its practical relevance, research on RGB-based drone tracking is still limited and largely reliant on conventional motion models. Meanwhile, foundation models like SAMURAI have established their effectiveness across other domains, exhibiting strong category-agnostic tracking performance. However, their applicability in drone-specific scenarios has not been investigated yet. Motivated by this gap, we present the first systematic evaluation of SAMURAI's potential for robust drone tracking in urban surveillance settings. Furthermore, we introduce a detector-augmented extension of SAMURAI to mitigate sensitivity to bounding-box initialization and sequence length. Our findings demonstrate that the proposed extension significantly improves robustness in complex urban environments, with pronounced benefits in long-duration sequences - especially under drone exit-re-entry events. The incorporation of detector cues yields consistent gains over SAMURAI's zero-shot performance across datasets and metrics, with success rate improvements of up to +0.393 and FNR reductions of up to -0.475.
tldr: The paper presents a detector-augmented extension of SAMURAI for robust long-term drone tracking in urban environments, showing significant improvements in success rate and FNR over the original SAMURAI. It addresses the problem of temporal inconsistencies caused by detection dropouts in long-duration drone tracking.
tldr_zh: 该论文提出了一种检测器增强的SAMURAI扩展，用于城市环境中鲁棒的长期无人机跟踪，与原始SAMURAI相比，在成功率和FNR方面显示出显著改进。它解决了由长期无人机跟踪中检测丢失引起的时序不一致问题。
summary_zh: 无人机的鲁棒长期跟踪是现代监控系统的关键需求，鉴于其日益增长的威胁潜力。虽然基于检测器的方法通常能实现强大的帧级别精度，但它们经常受到频繁检测掉线引起的时序不一致性困扰。尽管无人机跟踪具有实际意义，但基于RGB的无人机跟踪研究仍然有限，并且很大程度上依赖于传统的运动模型。与此同时，像SAMURAI这样的基础模型已经在其他领域确立了其有效性，展现出强大的类别无关跟踪性能。然而，它们在无人机特定场景中的适用性尚未得到研究。 受此空白的驱动，我们首次对SAMURAI在城市监控环境中鲁棒无人机跟踪方面的潜力进行了系统评估。此外，我们引入了SAMURAI的检测器增强扩展，以减轻其对边界框初始化和序列长度的敏感性。我们的研究结果表明，所提出的扩展显著提高了复杂城市环境中的鲁棒性，在长时间序列中具有显著优势——特别是在无人机退出-重新进入事件期间。 跨数据集和指标，检测器线索的整合产生了优于SAMURAI零样本性能的一致增益，成功率提高了高达+0.393，误漏率（FNR）降低了高达-0.475。

title: ProFuse: Efficient Cross-View Context Fusion for Open-Vocabulary 3D Gaussian Splatting
summary: We present ProFuse, an efficient context-aware framework for open-vocabulary 3D scene understanding with 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS). The pipeline enhances cross-view consistency and intra-mask cohesion within a direct registration setup, adding minimal overhead and requiring no render-supervised fine-tuning. Instead of relying on a pretrained 3DGS scene, we introduce a dense correspondence-guided pre-registration phase that initializes Gaussians with accurate geometry while jointly constructing 3D Context Proposals via cross-view clustering. Each proposal carries a global feature obtained through weighted aggregation of member embeddings, and this feature is fused onto Gaussians during direct registration to maintain per-primitive language coherence across views. With associations established in advance, semantic fusion requires no additional optimization beyond standard reconstruction, and the model retains geometric refinement without densification. ProFuse achieves strong open-vocabulary 3DGS understanding while completing semantic attachment in about five minutes per scene, which is two times faster than SOTA.
tldr: ProFuse introduces an efficient framework for open-vocabulary 3D scene understanding using 3D Gaussian Splatting, achieving faster semantic attachment than existing methods by pre-registering Gaussians and fusing cross-view context.
tldr_zh: ProFuse 提出了一种高效的开放词汇 3D 场景理解框架，使用 3D 高斯溅射 (3DGS)，通过预先注册高斯并融合跨视图上下文，实现了比现有方法更快的语义附加。
summary_zh: 我们提出了ProFuse，一个用于开放词汇三维场景理解的高效上下文感知框架，该框架基于三维高斯溅射(3DGS)。该流程增强了直接配准设置中的跨视角一致性和掩码内内聚性，同时增加了最小的开销，且无需渲染监督的微调。我们没有依赖预训练的3DGS场景，而是引入了一个密集对应引导的预配准阶段，该阶段在通过跨视角聚类联合构建三维上下文提议的同时，利用精确的几何结构初始化高斯分布。每个提议携带一个全局特征，该特征通过成员嵌入的加权聚合获得，并且该特征在直接配准期间被融合到高斯分布上，以保持跨视角的每图元语言连贯性。由于提前建立了关联，语义融合不需要标准重建之外的额外优化，并且模型保留了几何精细化，而无需致密化。ProFuse实现了强大的开放词汇三维高斯溅射理解，同时完成每个场景的语义附加大约需要五分钟，这比最新的方法快两倍。

title: Neural-Symbolic Integration with Evolvable Policies
summary: Neural-Symbolic (NeSy) Artificial Intelligence has emerged as a promising approach for combining the learning capabilities of neural networks with the interpretable reasoning of symbolic systems. However, existing NeSy frameworks typically require either predefined symbolic policies or policies that are differentiable, limiting their applicability when domain expertise is unavailable or when policies are inherently non-differentiable. We propose a framework that addresses this limitation by enabling the concurrent learning of both non-differentiable symbolic policies and neural network weights through an evolutionary process. Our approach casts NeSy systems as organisms in a population that evolve through mutations (both symbolic rule additions and neural weight changes), with fitness-based selection guiding convergence toward hidden target policies. The framework extends the NEUROLOG architecture to make symbolic policies trainable, adapts Valiant's Evolvability framework to the NeSy context, and employs Machine Coaching semantics for mutable symbolic representations. Neural networks are trained through abductive reasoning from the symbolic component, eliminating differentiability requirements. Through extensive experimentation, we demonstrate that NeSy systems starting with empty policies and random neural weights can successfully approximate hidden non-differentiable target policies, achieving median correct performance approaching 100%. This work represents a step toward enabling NeSy research in domains where the acquisition of symbolic knowledge from experts is challenging or infeasible.
tldr: This paper presents a novel neural-symbolic (NeSy) framework that uses evolutionary algorithms to learn both non-differentiable symbolic policies and neural network weights, enabling NeSy research in domains where expert symbolic knowledge is unavailable. It demonstrates success in approximating hidden non-differentiable target policies.
tldr_zh: 本文提出了一种新颖的神经符号（NeSy）框架，该框架使用进化算法来学习不可微分的符号策略和神经网络权重，从而在专家符号知识不可用的领域中实现NeSy研究。它展示了在逼近隐藏的不可微分目标策略方面的成功。
summary_zh: 神经符号（NeSy）人工智能已成为一种有前景的方法，它结合了神经网络的学习能力和符号系统的可解释推理。然而，现有的NeSy框架通常需要预定义的符号策略或可微分的策略，这限制了它们在领域专业知识不可用或策略本身不可微分时的适用性。我们提出了一种框架，通过进化过程实现不可微分的符号策略和神经网络权重的同步学习，从而解决了这一限制。我们的方法将NeSy系统视为种群中的生物体，这些生物体通过突变（包括符号规则的添加和神经权重的改变）进行进化，基于适应度的选择指导着向隐藏目标策略的收敛。该框架扩展了NEUROLOG架构以使符号策略可训练，将Valiant的可进化性框架应用于NeSy背景，并采用机器学习指导语义进行可变符号表示。通过从符号组件进行溯因推理来训练神经网络，消除了可微分性要求。通过大量的实验，我们证明了从空策略和随机神经权重开始的NeSy系统可以成功地逼近隐藏的不可微分目标策略，达到接近100%的中位数正确性能。这项工作代表着在专家难以或无法获取符号知识的领域中推动NeSy研究的一步。

title: Improving and Accelerating Offline RL in Large Discrete Action Spaces with Structured Policy Initialization
summary: Reinforcement learning in discrete combinatorial action spaces requires searching over exponentially many joint actions to simultaneously select multiple sub-actions that form coherent combinations. Existing approaches either simplify policy learning by assuming independence across sub-actions, which often yields incoherent or invalid actions, or attempt to learn action structure and control jointly, which is slow and unstable. We introduce Structured Policy Initialization (SPIN), a two-stage framework that first pre-trains an Action Structure Model (ASM) to capture the manifold of valid actions, then freezes this representation and trains lightweight policy heads for control. On challenging discrete DM Control benchmarks, SPIN improves average return by up to 39% over the state of the art while reducing time to convergence by up to 12.8$\times$.
tldr: The paper introduces SPIN, a two-stage offline RL framework that pre-trains an Action Structure Model (ASM) to learn valid action manifolds, then trains lightweight policy heads, achieving significant performance and speed improvements on discrete DM Control tasks.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了一种名为SPIN的两阶段离线强化学习框架，该框架首先预训练一个动作结构模型（ASM）来学习有效动作流形，然后训练轻量级策略头，在离散DM Control任务上实现了显著的性能和速度提升。
summary_zh: 离散组合动作空间中的强化学习需要在指数级增长的联合动作空间中搜索，以同时选择形成连贯组合的多个子动作。现有方法要么通过假设子动作之间的独立性来简化策略学习，这通常会产生不连贯或无效的动作，要么尝试联合学习动作结构和控制，这会导致速度慢且不稳定。我们引入了结构化策略初始化(SPIN)，这是一种两阶段框架，它首先预训练一个动作结构模型(ASM)来捕获有效动作的流形，然后冻结该表示并训练轻量级的策略头来进行控制。在具有挑战性的离散DM Control基准测试中，SPIN将平均回报提高了高达39%，同时将收敛时间缩短了高达12.8倍。

title: Agentic Rubrics as Contextual Verifiers for SWE Agents
summary: Verification is critical for improving agents: it provides the reward signal for Reinforcement Learning and enables inference-time gains through Test-Time Scaling (TTS). Despite its importance, verification in software engineering (SWE) agent settings often relies on code execution, which can be difficult to scale due to environment setup overhead. Scalable alternatives such as patch classifiers and heuristic methods exist, but they are less grounded in codebase context and harder to interpret. To this end, we explore Agentic Rubrics: an expert agent interacts with the repository to create a context-grounded rubric checklist, and candidate patches are then scored against it without requiring test execution. On SWE-Bench Verified under parallel TTS evaluation, Agentic Rubrics achieve a score of 54.2% on Qwen3-Coder-30B-A3B and 40.6% on Qwen3-32B, with at least a +3.5 percentage-point gain over the strongest baseline in our comparison set. We further analyze rubric behavior, showing that rubric scores are consistent with ground-truth tests while also flagging issues that tests do not capture. Our ablations show that agentic context gathering is essential for producing codebase-specific, unambiguous criteria. Together, these results suggest that Agentic Rubrics provide an efficient, scalable, and granular verification signal for SWE agents.
tldr: This paper introduces Agentic Rubrics, a method for verifying software engineering agents by using an expert agent to create context-grounded rubric checklists, avoiding the need for direct code execution. Results show improved performance over baselines on SWE-Bench Verified.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了一种名为 Agentic Rubrics 的方法，用于通过使用专家代理创建基于上下文的 rubric 检查表来验证软件工程代理，从而避免了直接代码执行的需求。结果表明，在 SWE-Bench Verified 上，性能优于基线。
summary_zh: 验证对于改进智能体至关重要：它为强化学习提供奖励信号，并通过测试时缩放（TTS）实现推理时性能提升。尽管验证很重要，但软件工程（SWE）智能体环境下的验证通常依赖于代码执行，这可能因环境搭建开销而难以扩展。存在诸如补丁分类器和启发式方法等可扩展的替代方案，但它们与代码库上下文的关联性较弱，且更难解释。为此，我们探索了智能体规则：一个专家智能体与代码仓库交互，以创建基于上下文的规则清单，然后根据该清单对候选补丁进行评分，而无需执行测试。在并行 TTS 评估下的 SWE-Bench Verified 上，智能体规则在 Qwen3-Coder-30B-A3B 上获得了 54.2% 的分数，在 Qwen3-32B 上获得了 40.6% 的分数，与我们的对比集中最强的基线相比，至少提高了 3.5 个百分点。我们进一步分析了规则行为，表明规则分数与真实测试一致，同时也标记了测试未捕获的问题。我们的消融实验表明，智能体上下文收集对于生成特定于代码库的、明确的标准至关重要。总之，这些结果表明，智能体规则为 SWE 智能体提供了一种高效、可扩展且精细的验证信号。

title: Data-Driven Terramechanics Approach Towards a Realistic Real-Time Simulator for Lunar Rovers
summary: High-fidelity simulators for the lunar surface provide a digital environment for extensive testing of rover operations and mission planning. However, current simulators focus on either visual realism or physical accuracy, which limits their capability to replicate lunar conditions comprehensively. This work addresses that gap by combining high visual fidelity with realistic terrain interaction for a realistic representation of rovers on the lunar surface. Because direct simulation of wheel-soil interactions is computationally expensive, a data-driven approach was adopted, using regression models for slip and sinkage from data collected in both full-rover and single-wheel experiments and simulations. The resulting regression-based terramechanics model accurately reproduced steady-state and dynamic slip, as well as sinkage behavior, on flat terrain and slopes up to 20 degrees, with validation against field test results. Additionally, improvements were made to enhance the realism of terrain deformation and wheel trace visualization. This method supports real-time applications that require physically plausible terrain response alongside high visual fidelity.
tldr: This paper introduces a data-driven terramechanics model for real-time lunar rover simulation, combining high visual fidelity with realistic terrain interaction using regression models for slip and sinkage.
tldr_zh: 本文介绍了一种用于实时月球车仿真的数据驱动型土壤-机械模型，该模型结合了高视觉逼真度和逼真的地形交互，使用回归模型来模拟滑移和沉陷。
summary_zh: 月球表面高保真模拟器为漫游车运行和任务规划的广泛测试提供了一个数字环境。然而，当前的模拟器主要关注视觉真实性或物理精确性，限制了其全面复制月球环境的能力。本文通过结合高视觉保真度和真实的 terrain 相互作用，以实现月球表面漫游车的逼真呈现，从而弥补了这一差距。由于直接模拟轮-土相互作用的计算成本很高，因此采用了一种数据驱动的方法，使用回归模型来处理从整车和单轮实验及仿真中收集的数据，用于预测滑移和沉陷。由此产生的基于回归的土力学模型准确地再现了在平坦地形和高达 20 度坡度上的稳态和动态滑移以及沉陷行为，并通过现场测试结果进行了验证。此外，还进行了改进，以增强 terrain 形变和车辙可视化的真实感。该方法支持需要物理上合理的 terrain 响应以及高视觉保真度的实时应用程序。

title: Enhanced-FQL($λ$), an Efficient and Interpretable RL with novel Fuzzy Eligibility Traces and Segmented Experience Replay
summary: This paper introduces a fuzzy reinforcement learning framework, Enhanced-FQL($λ$), that integrates novel Fuzzified Eligibility Traces (FET) and Segmented Experience Replay (SER) into fuzzy Q-learning with Fuzzified Bellman Equation (FBE) for continuous control tasks. The proposed approach employs an interpretable fuzzy rule base instead of complex neural architectures, while maintaining competitive performance through two key innovations: a fuzzified Bellman equation with eligibility traces for stable multi-step credit assignment, and a memory-efficient segment-based experience replay mechanism for enhanced sample efficiency. Theoretical analysis proves the proposed method convergence under standard assumptions. Extensive evaluations in continuous control domains demonstrate that Enhanced-FQL($λ$) achieves superior sample efficiency and reduced variance compared to n-step fuzzy TD and fuzzy SARSA($λ$) baselines, while maintaining substantially lower computational complexity than deep RL alternatives such as DDPG. The framework's inherent interpretability, combined with its computational efficiency and theoretical convergence guarantees, makes it particularly suitable for safety-critical applications where transparency and resource constraints are essential.
tldr: The paper introduces Enhanced-FQL($λ$), a fuzzy reinforcement learning framework that integrates fuzzy eligibility traces and segmented experience replay for continuous control, achieving better sample efficiency, lower variance, and higher interpretability compared to baseline fuzzy RL methods.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了Enhanced-FQL($λ$)，一个模糊强化学习框架，集成了模糊资格迹和分段经验回放，用于连续控制，与基线模糊强化学习方法相比，实现了更好的样本效率、更低的方差和更高的可解释性。
summary_zh: 本文提出了一种模糊强化学习框架，增强型FQL($λ$)，该框架将新颖的模糊化资格迹（FET）和分段经验回放（SER）集成到具有模糊化贝尔曼方程（FBE）的模糊Q学习中，用于连续控制任务。所提出的方法采用可解释的模糊规则库代替复杂的神经架构，并通过两个关键创新保持具有竞争力的性能：具有资格迹的模糊化贝尔曼方程，用于稳定的多步信用分配；以及一种节省内存的分段经验回放机制，用于提高样本效率。理论分析证明了所提出的方法在标准假设下收敛。在连续控制领域进行的大量评估表明，与n步模糊TD和模糊SARSA($λ$)基线相比，增强型FQL($λ$)实现了卓越的样本效率和降低的方差，同时保持远低于诸如DDPG等深度强化学习替代方案的计算复杂度。该框架固有的可解释性，结合其计算效率和理论收敛保证，使其特别适用于透明性和资源约束至关重要的安全关键型应用。

title: ImLoc: Revisiting Visual Localization with Image-based Representation
summary: Existing visual localization methods are typically either 2D image-based, which are easy to build and maintain but limited in effective geometric reasoning, or 3D structure-based, which achieve high accuracy but require a centralized reconstruction and are difficult to update. In this work, we revisit visual localization with a 2D image-based representation and propose to augment each image with estimated depth maps to capture the geometric structure. Supported by the effective use of dense matchers, this representation is not only easy to build and maintain, but achieves highest accuracy in challenging conditions. With compact compression and a GPU-accelerated LO-RANSAC implementation, the whole pipeline is efficient in both storage and computation and allows for a flexible trade-off between accuracy and highest memory efficiency. Our method achieves a new state-of-the-art accuracy on various standard benchmarks and outperforms existing memory-efficient methods at comparable map sizes. Code will be available at https://github.com/cvg/Hierarchical-Localization.
tldr: The paper presents ImLoc, a novel image-based visual localization method that augments images with estimated depth maps, achieving state-of-the-art accuracy with efficient storage and computation.
tldr_zh: 本文提出了ImLoc，一种新颖的基于图像的视觉定位方法，通过增加估计的深度图来增强图像，从而以高效的存储和计算实现最先进的精度。
summary_zh: 现有的视觉定位方法通常是基于2D图像的，易于构建和维护，但有效几何推理能力有限；或是基于3D结构的，精度很高但需要集中重建，并且难以更新。在这项工作中，我们重新审视了使用2D图像表示的视觉定位，并提出利用估计的深度图来增强每个图像，以捕获几何结构。凭借密集匹配器的有效使用，这种表示不仅易于构建和维护，而且在具有挑战性的条件下实现了最高的精度。通过紧凑压缩和GPU加速的LO-RANSAC实现，整个流程在存储和计算上都很高效，并允许在精度和最高内存效率之间进行灵活的权衡。我们的方法在各种标准基准上实现了新的最先进的精度，并且在可比的地图大小下优于现有的内存高效方法。代码将在https://github.com/cvg/Hierarchical-Localization上提供。

title: Survival Dynamics of Neural and Programmatic Policies in Evolutionary Reinforcement Learning
summary: In evolutionary reinforcement learning tasks (ERL), agent policies are often encoded as small artificial neural networks (NERL). Such representations lack explicit modular structure, limiting behavioral interpretation. We investigate whether programmatic policies (PERL), implemented as soft, differentiable decision lists (SDDL), can match the performance of NERL. To support reproducible evaluation, we provide the first fully specified and open-source reimplementation of the classic 1992 Artificial Life (ALife) ERL testbed. We conduct a rigorous survival analysis across 4000 independent trials utilizing Kaplan-Meier curves and Restricted Mean Survival Time (RMST) metrics absent in the original study. We find a statistically significant difference in survival probability between PERL and NERL. PERL agents survive on average 201.69 steps longer than NERL agents. Moreover, SDDL agents using learning alone (no evolution) survive on average 73.67 steps longer than neural agents using both learning and evaluation. These results demonstrate that programmatic policies can exceed the survival performance of neural policies in ALife.
tldr: This paper compares the survival performance of neural and programmatic policies in an evolutionary reinforcement learning environment, finding that programmatic policies outperform neural policies in a reimplementation of a classic ALife testbed. It provides a fully specified and open-source reimplementation of the testbed.
tldr_zh: 本文比较了进化强化学习环境中神经策略和程序策略的生存性能，发现程序策略在经典ALife测试平台的重新实现中优于神经策略。同时，它提供了一个完全指定的开源测试平台。
summary_zh: 在演化强化学习任务（ERL）中，智能体策略通常被编码为小型人工神经网络（NERL）。这类表示缺乏明确的模块化结构，限制了行为解释性。我们研究了可编程策略（PERL），即以软、可微决策列表（SDDL）实现，是否能与NERL的性能相媲美。为了支持可复现的评估，我们提供了经典的1992年人工生命（ALife）ERL测试平台的首个完全指定且开源的重新实现。我们利用Kaplan-Meier曲线和限制平均生存时间（RMST）指标，在4000次独立试验中进行了严格的生存分析，而原始研究中并未采用这些指标。我们发现PERL和NERL之间的生存概率存在统计学上的显著差异。PERL智能体平均比NERL智能体多存活201.69步。此外，仅使用学习（不进行演化）的SDDL智能体平均比同时使用学习和演化的神经智能体多存活73.67步。这些结果表明，在人工生命中，可编程策略可以超过神经策略的生存性能。

title: Model of Spatial Human-Agent Interaction with Consideration for Others
summary: Communication robots often need to initiate conversations with people in public spaces. At the same time, such robots must not disturb pedestrians. To handle these two requirements, an agent needs to estimate the communication desires of others based on their behavior and then adjust its own communication activities accordingly. In this study, we construct a computational spatial interaction model that considers others. Consideration is expressed as a quantitative parameter: the amount of adjustment of one's internal state to the estimated internal state of the other. To validate the model, we experimented with a human and a virtual robot interacting in a VR environment. The results show that when the participant moves to the target, a virtual robot with a low consideration value inhibits the participant's movement, while a robot with a higher consideration value did not inhibit the participant's movement. When the participant approached the robot, the robot also exhibited approaching behavior, regardless of the consideration value, thus decreasing the participant's movement. These results appear to verify the proposed model's ability to clarify interactions with consideration for others.
tldr: This paper presents a spatial interaction model for robots that factors in human consideration by adjusting the robot's behavior based on estimations of a person's desires. VR experiments suggest the model can differentiate between considerate and inconsiderate robot behaviors.
tldr_zh: 该论文提出了一个空间交互模型，机器人可以通过评估人类的意愿来调整自身行为，从而考虑到人类的感受。虚拟现实实验表明，该模型可以区分周到和不周到的机器人行为。
summary_zh: 沟通机器人常常需要在公共空间发起与人的对话。与此同时，此类机器人又不能打扰行人。为了满足这两个要求，智能体需要根据他人的行为估计其交流意愿，并据此调整自身的交流活动。在本研究中，我们构建了一个考虑他人的计算空间交互模型。这里的“考虑”被表达为一个量化参数：即个体调整自身内部状态以适应他人估计内部状态的程度。为了验证该模型，我们进行了一项实验，让一个人和一个虚拟机器人在VR环境中互动。结果表明，当参与者向目标移动时，低“考虑”值的虚拟机器人会抑制参与者的移动，而高“考虑”值的机器人则不会。当参与者靠近机器人时，无论“考虑”值如何，机器人都会表现出靠近的行为，从而减少参与者的移动。这些结果似乎验证了所提出的模型在阐明考虑他人的交互方面的能力。

title: Design and Development of Modular Limbs for Reconfigurable Robots on the Moon
summary: In this paper, we present the development of 4-DOF robot limbs, which we call Moonbots, designed to connect in various configurations with each other and wheel modules, enabling adaptation to different environments and tasks. These modular components are intended primarily for robotic systems in space exploration and construction on the Moon in our Moonshot project. Such modular robots add flexibility and versatility for space missions where resources are constrained. Each module is driven by a common actuator characterized by a high torque-to-speed ratio, supporting both precise control and dynamic motion when required. This unified actuator design simplifies development and maintenance across the different module types. The paper describes the hardware implementation, the mechanical design of the modules, and the overall software architecture used to control and coordinate them. Additionally, we evaluate the control performance of the actuator under various load conditions to characterize its suitability for modular robot applications. To demonstrate the adaptability of the system, we introduce nine functional configurations assembled from the same set of modules: 4DOF-limb, 8DOF-limb, vehicle, dragon, minimal, quadruped, cargo, cargo-minimal, and bike. These configurations reflect different locomotion strategies and task-specific behaviors, offering a practical foundation for further research in reconfigurable robotic systems.
tldr: This paper presents the design and development of modular robot limbs (Moonbots) for space exploration, showcasing their adaptability through various configurations for different tasks and environments on the Moon. The modularity and unified actuator design aim to improve flexibility and versatility in resource-constrained space missions.
tldr_zh: 本文介绍了为太空探索而设计的模块化机器人肢体 (Moonbots) 的设计和开发，展示了其在月球上适应不同任务和环境的多种配置。模块化设计和统一的驱动器旨在提高资源受限的太空任务的灵活性和通用性。
summary_zh: 本文介绍了4自由度机器人肢体的开发，我们称之为Moonbots。该机器人肢体可以彼此以及与轮式模块以多种配置连接，从而适应不同的环境和任务。这些模块化组件主要用于我们的登月计划中，用于月球上的太空探索和建造的机器人系统。这种模块化机器人为资源受限的太空任务增加了灵活性和多功能性。每个模块由具有高力矩-转速比的通用执行器驱动，可在需要时支持精确控制和动态运动。这种统一的执行器设计简化了不同模块类型的开发和维护。本文描述了硬件实现、模块的机械设计以及用于控制和协调它们的整体软件架构。此外，我们评估了执行器在各种负载条件下的控制性能，以表征其对模块化机器人应用的适用性。为了证明系统的适应性，我们介绍了由同一组模块组装的九种功能配置：4自由度肢体、8自由度肢体、车辆、龙、极简、四足、货物、货物-极简和自行车。这些配置反映了不同的运动策略和特定于任务的行为，为可重构机器人系统的进一步研究提供了实践基础。

title: Fast Continuum Robot Shape and External Load State Estimation on SE(3)
summary: Previous on-manifold approaches to continuum robot state estimation have typically adopted simplified Cosserat rod models, which cannot directly account for actuation inputs or external loads. We introduce a general framework that incorporates uncertainty models for actuation (e.g., tendon tensions), applied forces and moments, process noise, boundary conditions, and arbitrary backbone measurements. By adding temporal priors across time steps, our method additionally performs joint estimation in both the spatial (arclength) and temporal domains, enabling full \textit{spacetime} state estimation. Discretizing the arclength domain yields a factor graph representation of the continuum robot model, which can be exploited for fast batch sparse nonlinear optimization in the style of SLAM. The framework is general and applies to a broad class of continuum robots; as illustrative cases, we show (i) tendon-driven robots in simulation, where we demonstrate real-time kinematics with uncertainty, tip force sensing from position feedback, and distributed load estimation from backbone strain, and (ii) a surgical concentric tube robot in experiment, where we validate accurate kinematics and tip force estimation, highlighting potential for surgical palpation.
tldr: This paper presents a novel framework for fast and accurate state estimation of continuum robots, incorporating actuation inputs, external loads, and arbitrary backbone measurements using a factor graph representation for efficient optimization.
tldr_zh: 本文提出了一种新颖的框架，用于快速准确地估计连续体机器人的状态，该框架结合了驱动输入、外部载荷和任意骨干测量，并使用因子图表示进行高效优化。
summary_zh: 先前在流形上的连续体机器人状态估计方法通常采用简化的Cosserat杆模型，无法直接考虑驱动输入或外部负载。我们引入了一个通用框架，该框架结合了驱动（例如，肌腱张力）、施加的力和力矩、过程噪声、边界条件和任意主链测量的 Uncertainty 模型。通过添加跨时间步的时间先验，我们的方法还可以在空间（弧长）和时间域中进行联合估计，从而实现完整的 \textit{时空}状态估计。离散化弧长域会产生连续体机器人模型的因子图表示，该表示可以用于类似 SLAM 的快速批量稀疏非线性优化。该框架具有通用性，适用于广泛的连续体机器人；作为示例，我们展示了 (i) 模拟中的肌腱驱动机器人，我们演示了具有uncertainty的实时运动学、从位置反馈进行末端力传感，以及从主链应变进行分布式载荷估计，以及 (ii) 实验中的外科同心管机器人，我们验证了精确的运动学和末端力估计，突出了手术触诊的潜力。

title: Embedding Autonomous Agents in Resource-Constrained Robotic Platforms
summary: Many embedded devices operate under resource constraints and in dynamic environments, requiring local decision-making capabilities. Enabling devices to make independent decisions in such environments can improve the responsiveness of the system and reduce the dependence on constant external control. In this work, we integrate an autonomous agent, programmed using AgentSpeak, with a small two-wheeled robot that explores a maze using its own decision-making and sensor data. Experimental results show that the agent successfully solved the maze in 59 seconds using 287 reasoning cycles, with decision phases taking less than one millisecond. These results indicate that the reasoning process is efficient enough for real-time execution on resource-constrained hardware. This integration demonstrates how high-level agent-based control can be applied to resource-constrained embedded systems for autonomous operation.
tldr: This paper demonstrates the successful integration of an AgentSpeak-programmed autonomous agent on a resource-constrained two-wheeled robot, enabling independent navigation in a maze with efficient real-time reasoning.
tldr_zh: 本文展示了在资源受限的双轮机器人上成功集成了一个基于AgentSpeak编程的自主代理，使其能够在迷宫中独立导航，并具有高效的实时推理能力。
summary_zh: 许多嵌入式设备在资源受限且动态的环境中运行，需要本地决策能力。使设备能够在这样的环境中做出自主决策可以提高系统的响应速度，并降低对持续外部控制的依赖性。在这项工作中，我们集成了一个使用AgentSpeak编程的自主代理，以及一个通过自身决策和传感器数据探索迷宫的小型两轮机器人。实验结果表明，该代理成功地在59秒内利用287个推理周期解决了迷宫问题，决策阶段耗时不到一毫秒。这些结果表明，推理过程足够高效，可以在资源受限的硬件上进行实时执行。这种集成展示了如何将高级的基于代理的控制应用于资源受限的嵌入式系统以实现自主运行。

title: Driver-Intention Prediction with Deep Learning: Real-Time Brain-to-Vehicle Communication
summary: Brain-computer interfaces (BCIs) allow direct communication between the brain and electronics without the need for speech or physical movement. Such interfaces can be particularly beneficial in applications requiring rapid response times, such as driving, where a vehicle's advanced driving assistance systems could benefit from immediate understanding of a driver's intentions. This study presents a novel method for predicting a driver's intention to steer using electroencephalography (EEG) signals through deep learning. A driving simulator created a controlled environment in which participants imagined controlling a vehicle during various driving scenarios, including left and right turns, as well as straight driving. A convolutional neural network (CNN) classified the detected EEG data with minimal pre-processing. Our model achieved an accuracy of 83.7% in distinguishing between the three steering intentions and demonstrated the ability of CNNs to process raw EEG data effectively. The classification accuracy was highest for right-turn segments, which suggests a potential spatial bias in brain activity. This study lays the foundation for more intuitive brain-to-vehicle communication systems.
tldr: This paper explores using a CNN to predict driver steering intentions from EEG data in a driving simulator, achieving 83.7% accuracy in classifying left, right, and straight intentions, demonstrating the feasibility of brain-to-vehicle communication.
tldr_zh: 本文探索使用卷积神经网络（CNN）从驾驶模拟器中的脑电图（EEG）数据预测驾驶员的转向意图，在分类左转、右转和直行意图方面实现了 83.7% 的准确率，证明了脑-车通信的可行性。
summary_zh: 脑机接口(BCI)允许大脑与电子设备之间进行直接通信，无需言语或肢体运动。这种接口在需要快速响应的应用中尤其有益，比如驾驶，其中车辆的先进驾驶辅助系统可以从对驾驶员意图的立即理解中受益。本研究提出了一种新方法，通过深度学习利用脑电图(EEG)信号来预测驾驶员的转向意图。驾驶模拟器创建了一个受控环境，参与者在各种驾驶场景中想象控制车辆，包括左转和右转以及直线行驶。卷积神经网络(CNN)对检测到的脑电数据进行分类，且仅需最少的预处理。我们的模型在区分三种转向意图时达到了83.7%的准确率，并证明了CNN有效处理原始脑电数据的能力。右转路段的分类准确率最高，这表明大脑活动可能存在空间偏差。本研究为更直观的脑-车通信系统奠定了基础。

title: Precomputing Multi-Agent Path Replanning using Temporal Flexibility: A Case Study on the Dutch Railway Network
summary: Executing a multi-agent plan can be challenging when an agent is delayed, because this typically creates conflicts with other agents. So, we need to quickly find a new safe plan. Replanning only the delayed agent often does not result in an efficient plan, and sometimes cannot even yield a feasible plan. On the other hand, replanning other agents may lead to a cascade of changes and delays. We show how to efficiently replan by tracking and using the temporal flexibility of other agents while avoiding cascading delays. This flexibility is the maximum delay an agent can take without changing the order of or further delaying more agents. Our algorithm, FlexSIPP, precomputes all possible plans for the delayed agent, also returning the changes for the other agents, for any single-agent delay within the given scenario. We demonstrate our method in a real-world case study of replanning trains in the densely-used Dutch railway network. Our experiments show that FlexSIPP provides effective solutions, relevant to real-world adjustments, and within a reasonable timeframe.
tldr: The paper introduces FlexSIPP, an algorithm that precomputes multi-agent path replanning solutions leveraging temporal flexibility to address delays, tested on the Dutch railway network.
tldr_zh: 本文介绍了一种名为FlexSIPP的算法，该算法利用时间灵活性预先计算多智能体路径重规划解决方案，以解决延误问题，并在荷兰铁路网络上进行了测试。
